title: Companions - Dogfolk
description: Adds cute little helpers into the game to assist you in combat or by simply carrying your items.
body:
This mod adds cute little helpers into the game!
They can help you carry your stuff and fight on your side.




By default they spawn in plains biome. (You can change this and other spawn settings by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders)

You can tame them with meat.
If they are already tamed then you can heal them with meat.

You can change its behavior by clicking on it with a bone item (in your the main hand)
(follow you, walk randomly, sit down)


You can equip an item into its main hand by sneaking + click on it with an item.

Or take its item away from it by sneaking + click on it empty handed.


If you want to open its inventory, you have to simple click on it empty handed while not sneaking.



Mod Currently Supports:

**Forge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**


SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU ENCOUNTER ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE
